h04e88cc3g15e0g4c9ag8d8dg4720cd2712b2: Umberlee speed you on your way. Won't trouble you any further.
hbb6a95feg3c65g40a5g8e3bgf0a06fb81e69: We don't want trouble. We're leaving. Please.
h61bf8cc8g8fb0g4ef3g957bg119d459502fa: Ah... ah, good luck to you.
h035dcda1g4c98g45fbg8913g99681fe62eb5: That... thing. It was speaking... in my head.
hc8c3663fg85c2g47aegb349g45c2050da432: Oh Umberlee spare us, no. My friends - what happened to them? What's going on?
hb4b45d45g81a9g4f92gb642g2a86c536560d: They tried to kill me. I killed them first.
hb78bb1a2g068eg4eb4gb5f2gd834e66888fe: I... I see. I'm sorry - we meant no harm. We saw the crash, and then I remember... that thing. Its voice, in our minds.
h3a0dfb8eg9904g4e65g9f3eg4a35cb9cc495: I was defending myself. I'm sorry.
h7eb6baf8gbd1dg4b7ag9c94g80cf3a4e9861: I... I understand. Just... please know that we meant no harm.
haf31acceg6946g4660gb765ga31a89f6b29b: We saw the crash and came to help. That... thing got a hold of us.
h8e3dd635g9864g409fg82ceg4094f561a639: That monster was using you like a puppet.
h432cb6a0g1b59g4bfbgb9dbg05b3f9f890aa: Whatever was happening, it ended with that monster.
h296c899ag035bg41dcgb7d3gef4e3a7ea465: We were on the river. We were afraid to come ashore, but then we heard... screaming.
hb20f9dfdgc3f5g4180gb302gf865370ba357: I remember getting close and... hearing a voice. It said we were special. That we could help.
hed9380e0gea08g4655gab5bga49d199f94a1: You allowed the ghaik to use you. You're unclean.
hf0adaadbg4d4fg419fgb7e6g8fe1df56ec4b: A... a gayk? Whatever that thing is, it would have had me if not for you. We watched the crash from the river.
h000f55d2g427cg4916gaee7g0526c64cdcb7: Oh Umberlee spare us, no. My friends - what happened to him? What's going on?
h0dfdeed9gc546g46efg8f3cgb6401a49b989: Oh Umberlee spare us, no. My friend - what happened to her? What's going on?
h2dd0b1e7g3022g49b3g9879gf76a4bdae296: It's all... it's like a dream. What happened? What's going on?
hec50f99bg7c9ag4333g952bg75b9770c1f54: You tried to kill me, that's what.
hbf3c41ceg76beg4fe8gb808gab79f9523342: I'm truly, truly glad we weren't able. Thank you.
h1e4e4bc9g5f9bg4c8dgb267geac6e38af9c7: We saw the crash from the river. We were too scared to move at first, but that thing... spoke to us.
h7666d487gde9cg49a1g992eg21efc1284e8b: We... we were ready to die for it. Came ashore so fast we crashed the boat. I... I don't know what we'll do, now.
hb2d37cf7gb654g4664gbf1cg9879853dd2fd: It could be worse - your ship didn't fall from the sky.
ha1ebddbdgb31cg4036g91f8g86cc74bfe408: You were... you were on that thing? Heading where? This is the middle of nowhere -
hf468b2a6g0502g48d3gb9e9g3e8a9351917f: Wait. Your... your mind. I can still feel it, like an echo. You... you're like that thing.
hb72d0bc1gfbdbg4e1cg847dg0e67c26f2046: What? I saved you from that thing.
h57683ebdge6cfg441bga623g95256f5b52b1: Please. I'm grateful for your help, truly... but I don't want any more trouble. I'll go, all right? I'll go!
h2c191240g4af6g4050gad2bge6a0cdd3dd3f: Please. We're grateful for your help, truly... but we don't want any more trouble. We'll go, all right? We'll go!
he0619bf1gf001g4da0ga64cg5e82a7412ed8: Calm down. They did something to me, but I escaped.
hbaf51136g2020g49c9g974eg5c4c326b0995: Show some gratitude, or you'll find that I'm a lot worse.
h3d66aaacgfedeg4771g827fgdcbf141298f3: First things first. Where are we?
h2f4d9ba7g18fcg4f75gaae1g7a9d95190d2e: Nowhere I can find on a map. I know Baldur's Gate is a few days downriver, but -
h28751d12gb285g4d9fgaddag57c26be96587: Your boat - can it be repaired?
hb7265cefg4bd0g4399g830egdfaee3376314: Perhaps. But I wouldn't like to tarry too long in this wilderness. We're -
h48028264g312cg4bf1ga24dg27e87bf336b6: Figure it out yourself. I have neither time nor patience to train a new slave.
h05b76778g011dg45b9g9d94g65bb108d2aa5: You... of course. I did not think to meet a drow in this wilderness, least of all -
hd07470cbg4481g4445gabe7gb29de7760f46: Start by handing over your valuables.
h1127430fg0efcg4aa5g8a9bg446a406638e8: That monster was using you like a puppet.
h69c15b4dga0a8g4893g9b29ga4f5dc45ed97: It's... I'm not sure I want to remember.
h1cb51358gd49ag4a8fgaf07g4ca0b449d3bf: It looked like you were helping that thing.
hf5f0870cg1126g4c11g94dfgd55b53bd145c: I just... I just remember digging.
hd4880a9dg0671g4b58g8f8fgc237c2dc0656: This voice in your head - what was it saying?
h2cea183eg0103g4c25gb968g8c7914af5450: That... that we were special. That it needed our help.
h828797e5gf7aeg4bbdg9114gf9d3f8d8650a: We saw the crash from the river. But even then we could... hear it. Feel it in our minds.
